headline: Here Are Wednesday’s Best Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Devon Energy, Flowserve, Klaviyo, Macerich, Merck, Nucor, Take-Two Interactive Software, Twilio, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading higher this morning, but if you’ve ever heard the old saying, “when the chips are down”, that was the poster child phrase for Tuesday’s session, as technology stocks, and specifically the semiconductor stocks, followed a worldwide sell-off that initially began in Korea and carried around the globe. headline: Wells Fargo Upgrades Invitation Homes to Overweight, Raises Price Target to $33
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst James Feldman   upgrades Invitation Homes (NYSE:INVH) from Equal-Weight to Overweight and raises the price target from $31 to $33.
